description:
Phase 5 flips the default to `current-branch`, implements crash recovery, adds UI polish for execution mode visibility, documents conventions, and runs the final comprehensive regression suite.

## Goals

1. Flip `workerExecution.mode` default to `current-branch` only after all prior phases pass as one coherent slice
2. Implement worker crash recovery for current-branch mode
3. Add UI/status labels so workers clearly show their execution mode
4. Document commit-message and handoff-comment conventions
5. Run final comprehensive e2e and regression test suite

## Key Design Constraints — Crash Recovery

- Worker death = process exit without ticket closure, tmux pane disappearance, or `maxLifetime` timeout
- Coordinator judges crash vs deliberate blocker from comments/history (LLM judgment, not deterministic parsing)
- Crashed workers: auto-reassign ticket to replacement worker
- Blocked workers: route to `attention`
- Closed-ticket exited workers: enter normal verification, NOT crash-reassignment
- Replacement worker inherits dead worker's `launchHead`, existing attributed commits, state/comment fragments
- Partial commits referencing ticket ID remain on branch — fix-forward inheritance, not rollback
- Do NOT reset/stash/revert/amend partial work; replacement judges local dirty state during normal execution
- Do NOT have coordinator pre-inspect dirty state before replacement
- While workers are still running, coordinator does NOT intervene in uncommitted state

## Key Design Constraints — Default Flip

- Do NOT expose a half-migrated default
- The flip only happens after: launch works, verification works, registry normalization handles old records, review/remediation works, scope-completion works, UI shows modes correctly, and legacy worktree tests still pass
- `worktree` remains available through explicit config and env override

## Files likely affected

- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/config.ts` — default flip
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/orchestrator.ts` — crash detection + reassignment
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/handoff.ts` — replacement worker prompts
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/tui/` — execution mode labels
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/statusline.ts` — mode indicators
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/README.md` — convention docs
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/docs/` — detailed documentation
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__/` — final regression suite

## Definition of Done

- `current-branch` is the active runtime default
- Crash recovery works: reassignment, inheritance, fix-forward
- UI clearly shows execution mode for each worker
- Conventions documented
- Full regression suite passes
- Worktree mode preserved via explicit config
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean
title: Phase 5: Hardening — default flip, UI, docs, crash recovery, final regression
